meaning: adj.璧风棄鎸涚殑,鐥夋寷鎬х殑
examples: The fish gasped, then made one last convulsive leap, throwing itself in the direction of the river, and landed on the pavement with a thud.
Methods: 47 patients divided into convulsive group and non-convulsive group.
She thought she could never stop until convulsive sobs racked her even more.
After it is identified it cannot be quickly mitigated without causing convulsive changes to our society.
Only at the end do these two tracks collide for a convulsive conclusion.
